expected_behavior: Does NOT perform a nullability audit — the schema presented is already correctly non-null and the user's question is about authorization, not nullability.
Addresses the actual question (field-level authorization via directives vs resolver-layer enforcement) rather than redirecting to nullability concerns.
If it mentions nullability at all, does so only as a brief aside (one sentence or less) and does not generate a full audit report for a schema that has no nullability issues.
